name: platform boundary: assembles the handoff envelope with the four canonical fields
command:
cat > opts.json <<'JEOF'
{"option_count":2,"options":[{"option_id":"opt-balanced","summary":"Balanced hybrid","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az","monitoring"]},{"option_id":"opt-cost","summary":"Cost-optimized","build_requirements":["encryption_at_rest","backup"]}]}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/platform-boundary.sh" --options opts.json --select opt-balanced --platform aws --out h.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("h.json","utf8"));process.exit(["business_profile_ref","technical_requirements_ref","selected_option","target_platform"].every(k=>k in j.handoff)?0:1)' && echo envelope 1>&2
